metadata.title: Conformal Semantic Keypoint Detection with Statistical Guarantees

sections.title: Object Pose Estimation: why untrustworthy?
content:
Current pipelines rely onheuristic predictionwhich are not guaranteed to be close to groundtruth. 
                    Popular heuristics (e.g., RANSAC) get trapped in local minima and fail without notice.

figures.description: 物体姿态估计流程图，展示了关键点检测和优化阶段，以及启发式方法可能失败的案例。

sections.title: Our method: conformal keypoint detection
content: Paradigm shift:fromheuristic predictiontoprobabilistically correct prediction sets.
Key ingredient:inductive conformal prediction (ICP) — finite-sample uncertainty quantificationwithout assumptionson the data distribution or the prediction model.
Guarantee: Cover the true keypoints with a user-specified probability (e.g., 90%)

figures.description: 符合性关键点检测框架图，包含校准集、非符合性函数和最终的符合性预测输出。

sections.title: Experiments: works out of the box!
content: Setup:200 images for calibration, 1214 images for testing.
User:give me 90% and 95% coverage of the true keypoints.
The results demonstratevalid coverage(90%, 95%) andsmall sizeof the prediction sets across various objects in the LineMOD Occluded dataset.

figures.description: 实验结果图表，展示了在LineMOD数据集上的覆盖率直方图和ICP半径的累积分布函数(CDF)。
定性结果展示，不同物体在不同视角下的关键点预测集合可视化。
